items.headline: EU prepares new sanctions package on Russian oil exports
items.body: European Union officials are discussing a new round of sanctions targeting Russian oil shipments and related financial services.

items.headline: Major bank faces investigation over alleged money-laundering violations
items.body: Regulators in the US and EU have launched a joint probe into a global bank over suspected breaches of anti-money laundering rules.

items.headline: Ceasefire agreement reached in long-running border conflict
items.body: Both sides agreed to halt military operations and open talks on a permanent peace settlement.
